pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Quality KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.433) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Products. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Products roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for Director of Data Products roles increasingly include Data Quality competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for Director of Data Products now include Data Quality competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Data Quality skill KSA is relevant to the Director of Data Products based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
